title: Associate Principal Systems Administrator
bullets: Install, configure, and maintain Red Hat Linux and VMware ESXi 8 environments, identifying and remediating vulnerabilities.
Automate system administration tasks using Ansible and Bash scripting to improve efficiency and security.
Deploy, manage, and troubleshoot multi-petabyte NFS storage solutions using Qumulo and Red Hat high availability clusters.
Manage virtual machine environments using VMware vSphere, including provisioning, modification, and administration.
Administer system security, including user account creation, access control, and compliance with DISA STIG standards.
Deploy and maintain HPE Gen 10 and 11 server hardware, workstation desktops, and thin client devices.
Maintain and optimize multi-user computer systems, coordinating with network engineers to ensure seamless operation.
Configure RAID storage for Scality RING pre-deployment, ensuring data integrity and performance.
Mentor and assist junior staff with troubleshooting and professional development.
